props.name: pressed
props.description: Whether the button is pressed. Controlled: changing it updates the control, so it can reflect external selection state. For uncontrolled use, pass it once and drive clicks via `onPressedChange`.

props.name: check
props.description: Show a leading checkmark when pressed (the filter-chip look) — reveals the selected state explicitly, the way a checkbox does. Pairs with `ToggleGroup` for multi-select filter chips.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name; required when the slot is icon-only.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name — when checked, submits `value` under it.
